==== module.tlua (0 errors) ====
    return { value = 1 }
    
==== main.tlua (9 errors) ====
    // Import types accept only a module specifier; their former attributes
    // argument is not part of tlua syntax.
    type Module = import("./module", { with: { type: "json" } })
